Bash(python3 -c "
import matplotlib.font_manager as fm
fonts = [f.name for f in fm.fontManager.ttflist]
chinese = [f for f in fonts if any\(c in f.lower\(\) for c in ['heiti','songti','kaiti','hei','ping','noto','cjk','chinese','han','gothic']\)]
print\(sorted\(set\(chinese\)\)\)
")
